title: Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian Custom GUI Pack
description: Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian Custom GUI Pack
body: ![main menu](https://i.imgur.com/WMcFbW8.png) ### Introduction: This is a GUI-only resource pack themed after the anime "Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian." It’s designed to work alongside other resource packs—simply place it on top of your existing pack. This pack features a White, Pink, and Blue palette with custom images for every container, including the hot bar. If you’d like to see different color schemes, such as Red & Yellow or others, let me know, and I’ll consider them for future updates! If you find any bugs, report them, and I’ll fix them promptly. Community Engagement: Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, participate in anime discussions, and enter monthly giveaways for Discord Nitro! [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ] ### Feature Highlights: - HUD: ![HUD](https://i.imgur.com/7Zk43dg.png) - Settings: ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/ZsTEcC1.png) - Crafting Table: ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/1vz6KJa.png) - Anvil: ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/ZQxWbav.png) - Brewing Stand: ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/w9uUdCM.png) - Shulker Box: ![Shulker Box](https://i.imgur.com/wsZeRob.png) - Chest: ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/RDoNkMA.png) - Enchantment Table: ![Enchantment Table](https://i.imgur.com/2wLvphz.png) - Dropper: ![Dropper](https://i.imgur.com/82I0iys.png) - Furnace: ![Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/wLPCnv1.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
